note: c2rust-inlined header macro (postgres.h); reproduced idiomatically via Datum::from_oid for the scankey args.
c2rust-inlined header macro (htup_details.h); the Form_pg_class field reads are done via heap_deform_tuple + indexed DeformedColumn access (same fields, same offsets).
hash_seq + HASH_REMOVE over entries matching (relid==Invalid || entry.relid==Invalid || entry.relid==relid) becomes retain() with the complemented predicate; same set removed.

skey built by hand (fmgr_info_cxt(F_OIDEQ)+BTEqual+Invalid subtype/collation, attnos reltablespace/relfilenode) via fmgr seam check; hash created in its own cache context; CacheRegisterRelcacheCallback via inval seam. Build-skey-before-hash ordering preserved.

tablespace==MyDatabaseTableSpace->0; cache probe incl negative entries; GLOBALTABLESPACE->relmapper(shared); else pg_class systable scan skipping RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP, dup->error, then relmapper(local) if not found; insert into cache after the scan. MyDatabaseTableSpace passed explicitly (no ambient global). relmapper/genam/fmgr via seams.
